mapper.select:
SELECT prvc_prcs_proc_log_oid AS prvcPrcsProcLogOid, DATE_FORMAT(acs_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS acsDt, acs_user_oid AS acsUserOid, acs_id AS acsId, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(acs_ip, #{aesKey}) AS acsIp, menu_nm AS menuNm, flfmt_task_dtl AS flfmtTaskDtl, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(info_prcs_subj, #{aesKey}) AS infoPrcsSubj, rsn, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDt, reg_id AS regId FROM ${schema}.prvc_prcs_proc_log
AND UPPER(${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(info_prcs_subj, #{aesKey})) LIKE CAST(CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{filter.searchValue}), '%') AS CHAR) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND UPPER(acs_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{filter.acsId}), '%')
AND menu_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.menuNm}, '%')
AND flfmt_task_dtl = #{filter.flfmtTaskDtl}
AND acs_dt >= STR_TO_DATE(#{filter.startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND acs_dt <= STR_TO_DATE(#{filter.endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND reg_dt >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{filter.excelExportYm}, '-', ''), '01'), '%Y%m%d')
AND reg_dt < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{filter.excelExportYm}, '-', ''), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
